relationships.evidence: all this negative talk around the Achilles injury and people are like, "You'll never be back. You'll never be the same."
Started gaining strength back in your calf.
Electrical stimulation stimulates the nerves that contract the muscle.
confident you're go back and beat Jason Han the way you were before.
We going to get back, Doc.
I would swear he's about to come through the wall. And I don't know if he was in there beating the wall out of frustration
